data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of mileage tracking for reimbursement. While the linked use case mentions that the contractor tracks 127 miles between job sites, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation or validation of this feature through API reads or persisted state checks. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not demonstrate that the system properly tracks and processes mileage for reimbursement.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of mileage tracking for reimbursement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API endpoint for mileage tracking validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the mileage tracking feature correctly records and processes mileage for reimbursement.
